title: Internal Tool Registry Entry
description: JSON-serializable metadata for a registered tool in companion/tools/registry.js Map values. Non-serializable fields (handle, validateInput) are excluded. Used by tool-router via registry.get().

trust.description: Present on manifest-loaded tools; showcase built-ins may omit

packVersion.description: Manifest version copied at load time (camelCase internal field)

modelRole.description: camelCase internal field; maps to model_role in public metadata

requiresRuntime.description: Derived from permissions.includes('model.run') unless overridden on showcase tools

inputSchema.description: Repo-relative path to input JSON schema

outputSchema.description: Repo-relative path to output JSON schema

output.description: Parsed output JSON schema object loaded from outputSchema path

prompt.description: Optional showcase-tool prompt template; not exposed on GET /tools
